title: Korak 33

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should have an except clause that catches MediaError as e.
You should use an f-string to print Media Error: followed by a space and the error message within your new except block.

description: Kreiraj još jednu klauzulu except koja hvata MediaError as e. Unutar bloka except, koristi se f-string za štampanje Media Error: praćen razmakom i porukom o grešci.
